step_rationale: Vasoconstriction and endothelial dysfunction; coronary artery disease association.
mechanism: Urotensin II promotes vasoconstriction and endothelial activation, contributing to coronary atherosclerotic disease.

references.title: Dynamic Changes in Plasma Urotensin II and Its Correlation With Plaque Stability.
Role of urotensin II in atherosclerotic cardiovascular diseases.
references.journal: Cardiovascular revascularization medicine : including molecular interventions
